name: Alternative Tax Computation for Redemption of Nonqualified Notices

eligibility.description: Applies to cooperatives redeeming nonqualified written notices of allocation or nonqualified per-unit retain certificates.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: When a cooperative redeems nonqualified notices, it can choose the tax calculation that results in the lower tax: either a current year deduction or a credit for the tax paid in the year the notice was originally issued.
